title: AI & Application Development - Client Delivery Lead
description:
**Job Title: Client Delivery Lead – AI \& Application Development**
-------------------------------------------------------------------

### **Role Overview:**


We are looking for a dynamic and experienced **Client Delivery Lead** to drive end\-to\-end delivery of AI and Application Development projects. The role requires strong leadership in software engineering, solution design, and client engagement, ensuring successful project execution aligned with business objectives.### **Key Responsibilities:**

#### **Client \& Delivery Management**


Own end\-to\-end delivery of AI and application development programs.
Act as the primary point of contact for clients and build strong stakeholder relationships.
Understand client business challenges and translate them into scalable technology solutions.
Ensure projects are delivered on time, within scope, and within budget.
Manage delivery governance, reporting, risk mitigation, and escalations.#### **AI \& Solution Expertise**


Lead AI\-driven initiatives including ML models, data solutions, automation, and analytics platforms.
Collaborate with data scientists, AI engineers, and architects to design innovative solutions.
Ensure alignment of AI solutions with client business outcomes and ROI expectations.
Drive adoption of emerging technologies and best practices in AI and digital transformation.#### **Application Development \& Software Engineering**


Oversee full SDLC (Agile/Waterfall) delivery of enterprise applications.
Ensure engineering excellence, code quality, DevOps practices, and architecture standards.
Guide teams in modern tech stacks (Cloud, Microservices, APIs, etc.).
Ensure scalable, secure, and high\-performance application delivery.#### **Team Leadership**


Lead cross\-functional teams including architects, developers, QA, DevOps, and AI specialists.
Mentor and coach team members to enhance performance and technical capability.
Drive a culture of accountability, collaboration, and continuous improvement.#### **Delivery Governance \& Financial Management**


Manage project budgets, resource planning, and revenue forecasting.
Track KPIs, SLAs, and delivery metrics.
Identify and mitigate risks proactively.
Support pre\-sales activities, solution proposals, and client presentations.### **Required Skills \& Qualifications:**


10\+ years of experience in software delivery, with exposure to AI and enterprise application development.
Strong understanding of AI/ML concepts, cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP), and modern application architectures.
Proven experience managing large\-scale client delivery engagements.
Strong stakeholder management and communication skills.
Experience in Agile methodologies and DevOps practices.
Ability to translate business requirements into technology solutions.### **Preferred Qualifications:**


Experience in managing global delivery teams.
Exposure to digital transformation programs.
PMP / Agile / Cloud certifications are an advantage.

title: Software Engineer, Fleet Analytics, PhD, Early Career, 2026
description:
### **Minimum qualifications:**

* PhD degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* Experience applying mathematical techniques to solve large\-scale, intractable problems.
* Experience conducting advanced research in Computer Science, Applied Mathematics, or relevant experience.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* PhD in Statistics, Applied Mathematics, Operation Research, or a related field.
* Experience with mathematical optimization (e.g., LP, IP, MIP, NLP).
* Understanding of private and public cloud design considerations and limitations in the areas of virtualization and global infrastructure, distributed systems, load balancing and networking.

**About the job**
-----------------


Google's software engineers develop the next\-generation technologies that change how billions of users connect, explore, and interact with information and one another. Our products need to handle information at massive scale, and extend well beyond web search. We're looking for engineers who bring fresh ideas from all areas, including information retrieval, distributed computing, large\-scale system design, networking and data storage, security, artificial intelligence, natural language processing, UI design and mobile; the list goes on and is growing every day. As a software engineer, you will work on a specific project critical to Google’s needs with opportunities to switch teams and projects as you and our fast\-paced business grow and evolve. We need our engineers to be versatile, display leadership qualities and be enthusiastic to take on new problems across the full\-stack as we continue to push technology forward.  

  

As a key member of a small and versatile team, you design, test, deploy and maintain software solutions.



Within Google Cloud, the AI and Infrastructure (AI2\) organization is at the forefront of creating AI/ML capabilities. We are responsible for designing and managing the software, hardware, and Machine Learning (ML) systems infrastructure that power essential Google services such as Search and YouTube, as well as Google Cloud products.


As a PhD Software Engineer within AI2, your specialized research expertise will be instrumental in solving complex, real\-world problems on an unprecedented scale. You will engage in innovative projects spanning areas like AI/ML, networking, data storage, security, and distributed systems.


The AI and Infrastructure team is redefining what’s possible. We empower Google customers with breakthrough capabilities and insights by delivering AI and Infrastructure at unparalleled scale, efficiency, reliability and velocity. Our customers include Googlers, Google Cloud customers, and billions of Google users worldwide.


We're the driving force behind Google's groundbreaking innovations, empowering the development of our cutting\-edge AI models, delivering unparalleled computing power to global services, and providing the essential platforms that enable developers to build the future. From software to hardware our teams are shaping the future of world\-leading hyperscale computing, with key teams working on the development of our TPUs, Vertex AI for Google Cloud, Google Global Networking, Data Center operations, systems research, and much more.

**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Design, develop, and maintain advanced optimization models (e.g., mixed integer programming).
* Design and develop other platform capabilities.
* Experiment and prototype for foundational tech stacks comparison and selection.
* Implement, deploy, and rollout features following safe rollout practices.
* Interact with users, partner teams for feature scoping, rollout support, and training.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.

title: Engineering Analyst, Payments, Trust and Safety
description:
Note: By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following: **Hyderabad, Telangana, India; Bengaluru, Karnataka, India**.### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 2 years of experience in data analysis, including identifying trends, generating summary statistics, and drawing insights from quantitative and qualitative data.
* 2 years of experience managing projects and defining project scope, goals, and deliverables.
* 2 years of experience with one or more of the following languages: SQL, R, Python, or C\+\+.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* Master's degree in a quantitative discipline.
* 2 years of experience in the payments industry, working on risk or fraud management.
* Knowledge of one or more of the following areas: statistical analysis and machine learning libraries (e.g., R, Scikit\-learn,TensorFlow), programming languages (e.g., Python, C/C\+\+), Large Language Models (LLMs) or Generative AI.
* Ability to identify workflow pain points, optimize, automate and scale processes.
* Ability to be comfortable interacting with internal and external stakeholders.
* Excellent communication, problem\-solving, and critical thinking skills with attention to detail in an ever\-changing environment.

**About the job**
-----------------


Trust \& Safety team members are tasked with identifying and taking on the biggest problems that challenge the safety and integrity of our products. They use technical know\-how, excellent problem\-solving skills, user insights, and proactive communication to protect users and our partners from abuse across Google products like Search, Maps, Gmail, and Google Ads. On this team, you're a big\-picture thinker and strategic team\-player with a passion for doing what’s right. You work globally and cross\-functionally with Google engineers and product managers to identify and fight abuse and fraud cases at Google speed \- with urgency. And you take pride in knowing that every day you are working hard to promote trust in Google and ensuring the highest levels of user safety.



In this role you will work globally and cross\-functionally with Google Engineers and Product Managers to identify and fight abuse and fraud cases at Google speed, in order to ensure a safe and secure payments ecosystem for our users. You are keen to identify and solve complex problems and have very strong problem solving and technical skills to innovate and optimize our processes and tools. You are proactive, motivated, organized, reliable, innovative and are able to work well in a fast\-paced, global, cross\-functional, and team\-oriented environment to get things done. You take pride in knowing that every day you are working hard to promote users’ trust in Google and ensuring the highest levels of user safety.


At Google we work hard to earn our users’ trust every day. Trust \& Safety is Google’s team of abuse fighting and user trust experts working daily to make the internet a safer place. We partner with teams across Google to deliver bold solutions in abuse areas such as malware, spam and account hijacking. A team of Analysts, Policy Specialists, Engineers, and Program Managers, we work to reduce risk and fight abuse across all of Google’s products, protecting our users, advertisers, and publishers across the globe in over 40 languages.

**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Investigate fraud and abuse incidents, identify patterns and trends in order to generate holistic risk management solutions. Promote user trust and safety by managing and mitigating payment fraud, scams and abuse on Google products and services.
* Perform statistical analysis using payments and risk data warehouses. Collaborate with Engineering and Product teams to create and enhance tools, develop signals, improve system functionality, accuracy and efficiency.
* Facilitate and manage operations programs, working closely with Google Engineers, Product Managers and vendor operations to develop and track project schedules and timelines. Use technical expertise to drive and implement automation opportunities.
* Perform end\-to\-end assessment of the associated risk and vulnerability of products and features. Respond to escalations from internal and external parties within designated service levels.
* Perform on\-call responsibilities on a rotating basis, including weekend coverage.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.

title: Engineering Analyst, Payments, Trust and Safety
description:
Note: By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following: **Hyderabad, Telangana, India; Bengaluru, Karnataka, India**.### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 2 years of experience in data analysis, including identifying trends, generating summary statistics, and drawing insights from quantitative and qualitative data.
* 2 years of experience managing projects and defining project scope, goals, and deliverables.
* 2 years of experience with one or more of the following languages: SQL, R, Python, or C\+\+.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* Master's degree in a quantitative discipline.
* 2 years of experience in the payments industry, working on risk or fraud management.
* Knowledge of one or more of the following areas: statistical analysis and machine learning libraries (e.g., R, Scikit\-learn,TensorFlow), programming languages (e.g., Python, C/C\+\+), Large Language Models (LLMs) or Generative AI.
* Ability to identify workflow pain points, optimize, automate and scale processes.
* Ability to be comfortable interacting with internal and external stakeholders.
* Excellent communication, problem\-solving, and critical thinking skills with attention to detail in an ever\-changing environment.

**About the job**
-----------------


Trust \& Safety team members are tasked with identifying and taking on the biggest problems that challenge the safety and integrity of our products. They use technical know\-how, excellent problem\-solving skills, user insights, and proactive communication to protect users and our partners from abuse across Google products like Search, Maps, Gmail, and Google Ads. On this team, you're a big\-picture thinker and strategic team\-player with a passion for doing what’s right. You work globally and cross\-functionally with Google engineers and product managers to identify and fight abuse and fraud cases at Google speed \- with urgency. And you take pride in knowing that every day you are working hard to promote trust in Google and ensuring the highest levels of user safety.



In this role you will work globally and cross\-functionally with Google Engineers and Product Managers to identify and fight abuse and fraud cases at Google speed, in order to ensure a safe and secure payments ecosystem for our users. You are keen to identify and solve complex problems and have very strong problem solving and technical skills to innovate and optimize our processes and tools. You are proactive, motivated, organized, reliable, innovative and are able to work well in a fast\-paced, global, cross\-functional, and team\-oriented environment to get things done. You take pride in knowing that every day you are working hard to promote users’ trust in Google and ensuring the highest levels of user safety.


At Google we work hard to earn our users’ trust every day. Trust \& Safety is Google’s team of abuse fighting and user trust experts working daily to make the internet a safer place. We partner with teams across Google to deliver bold solutions in abuse areas such as malware, spam and account hijacking. A team of Analysts, Policy Specialists, Engineers, and Program Managers, we work to reduce risk and fight abuse across all of Google’s products, protecting our users, advertisers, and publishers across the globe in over 40 languages.

**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Investigate fraud and abuse incidents, identify patterns and trends in order to generate holistic risk management solutions. Promote user trust and safety by managing and mitigating payment fraud, scams and abuse on Google products and services.
* Perform statistical analysis using payments and risk data warehouses. Collaborate with Engineering and Product teams to create and enhance tools, develop signals, improve system functionality, accuracy and efficiency.
* Facilitate and manage operations programs, working closely with Google Engineers, Product Managers and vendor operations to develop and track project schedules and timelines. Use technical expertise to drive and implement automation opportunities.
* Perform end\-to\-end assessment of the associated risk and vulnerability of products and features. Respond to escalations from internal and external parties within designated service levels.
* Perform on\-call responsibilities on a rotating basis, including weekend coverage.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.

title: Senior Design Verification Engineer, TPU, Google Cloud
description:
### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering or equivalent practical experience.
* 8 years of experience in Verification, verifying digital logic at RTL level using SystemVerilog or Specman/E for Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs) or ASICs.
* Experience in verification and debug of IP/subsystem/SoCs in the Networking domain such as packet processing, bandwidth management, congestion control desired.
* Experience verifying digital systems using standard IP components/interconnects (e.g., microprocessor cores, hierarchical memory subsystems).

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* Master's degree in Electrical Engineering or a related field.
* Experience with industry\-standard simulators, revision control systems, and regression systems.
* Experience in Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning (AI/ML) Accelerators or vector processing units.
* Experience with the full verification life cycle.
* Excellent problem\-solving and communication skills.

**About the job**
-----------------


In this role, you’ll work to shape the future of AI/ML hardware acceleration. You will have an opportunity to drive cutting\-edge TPU (Tensor Processing Unit) technology that powers Google's most demanding AI/ML applications. You’ll be part of a team that pushes boundaries, developing custom silicon solutions that power the future of Google's TPU. You'll contribute to the innovation behind products loved by millions worldwide, and leverage your design and verification expertise to verify complex digital designs, with a specific focus on TPU architecture and its integration within AI/ML\-driven systems.
  

  

In this role, you will own the full verification life\-cycle from verification planning and test execution to coverage closure, with an emphasis on meeting stringent AI/ML performance and accuracy goals, build constrained\-random verification environments capable of exposing corner\-case bugs and ensuring the reliability of Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning (AI/ML) workloads on Tensor Processing Unit (TPU) hardware. You will collaborate closely with design and verification engineers in active projects and perform verification.
The AI and Infrastructure team is redefining what’s possible. We empower Google customers with breakthrough capabilities and insights by delivering AI and Infrastructure at unparalleled scale, efficiency, reliability and velocity. Our customers include Googlers, Google Cloud customers, and billions of Google users worldwide.


We're the driving team behind Google's groundbreaking innovations, empowering the development of our cutting\-edge AI models, delivering unparalleled computing power to global services, and providing the essential platforms that enable developers to build the future. From software to hardware our teams are shaping the future of world\-leading hyperscale computing, with key teams working on the development of our TPUs, Vertex AI for Google Cloud, Google Global Networking, Data Center operations, systems research, and much more.

**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Plan the verification of digital design blocks and interact with design engineers to identify important verification scenarios.
* Identify and write all types of coverage measures for stimulus and corner\-cases.
* Debug tests with design engineers to deliver functionally correct design blocks.
* Measure to identify verification holes and to show progress towards tape\-out.
* Create a constrained\-random verification environment using SystemVerilog and Universal Verification Methodology (UVM).
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.

title: Staff Software Engineer, Continuous Fleet Transformation and Optimization
description:
### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, a technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 8 years of experience in designing and developing large\-scale distributed systems and software.
* Experience with large\-scale distributed systems, software architecture, computational issues and advanced algorithms.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* Experience with mixed integer programming/linear programming or data center capacity planning/management.
* Experience with optimization problems or supply chain systems.

**About the job**
-----------------


Google Cloud's software engineers develop the next\-generation technologies that change how billions of users connect, explore, and interact with information and one another. We're looking for engineers who bring fresh ideas from all areas, including information retrieval, distributed computing, large\-scale system design, networking and data storage, security, artificial intelligence, natural language processing, UI design and mobile; the list goes on and is growing every day. As a software engineer, you will work on a specific project critical to Google Cloud's needs with opportunities to switch teams and projects as you and our fast\-paced business grow and evolve. You will anticipate our customer needs and be empowered to act like an owner, take action and innovate. We need our engineers to be versatile, display leadership qualities and be enthusiastic to take on new problems across the full\-stack as we continue to push technology forward.



The team is optimizing Google's fleet using Operations Decision Support and discrete algorithms, transitioning from Mixed\-Integer Programming (MIP) models to Machine Learning (ML)\-powered simulations for predictive, self\-governing systems.

  

Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise\-grade solutions that leverage Google’s cutting\-edge technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Guide the technical blueprint for Fleet Transformation, ensuring Google's infrastructure manages Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning (AI/ML) compute needs.
* Design and architect simulation engines and solvers for multi\-dimensional constraints (e.g., power, space, network) on global datasets with multiple variables.
* Advance MIP models by migrating fleet optimizations from localized to integrated, cluster\-wide solutions for better resource utilization and efficiency.
* Guide the self\-driving Fleet initiative by creating automated policy\-enforcement layers and lifecycle actions.
* Mentor engineers, promote cross\-functional synergy with Planning and Data Center Operations, and ensure reliability of global systems.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.

title: Technical Program Manager, Google Home Platforms
description:
### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree in a technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 5 years of experience in technical program management, project management or a related role within the software development life cycle.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* 5 years of experience managing cross\-functional or cross\-team projects.
* Experience with leading cross\-functional projects with multiple engineering teams, from initial planning through production launch.
* Experience leading cross\-functional projects with multiple engineering teams, from initial planning through production launch.
* Knowledge of software development methodologies (Agile, Scrum, etc.)., and best practices for release management.

**About the job**
-----------------


A problem isn’t truly solved until it’s solved for all. That’s why Googlers build products that help create opportunities for everyone, whether down the street or across the globe. As a Technical Program Manager at Google, you’ll use your technical expertise to lead complex, multi\-disciplinary projects from start to finish. You’ll work with stakeholders to plan requirements, identify risks, manage project schedules, and communicate clearly with cross\-functional partners across the company. You're equally comfortable explaining your team's analyses and recommendations to executives as you are discussing the technical tradeoffs in product development with engineers.


In this role, your goal is to transform Google's smart home innovation into high\-quality, seamless products by providing the technical aptitude and cross\-functional leadership necessary for success.


The Platforms and Devices team encompasses Google's various computing software platforms across environments (desktop, mobile, applications), as well as our first party devices and services that combine the best of Google AI, software, and hardware. Teams across this area research, design, and develop new technologies to make our user's interaction with computing faster and more seamless, building innovative experiences for our users around the world.

**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Drive operational excellence and best practices within the engineering organization, partner with leadership to identify and implement strategic initiatives that improve overall efficiency and productivity.
* Establish and manage core operational rhythms and processes, such as resource planning and goal tracking, to ensure the Engineering organization can scale effectively and predictably.
* Manage technical projects or programs. Work closely with Google engineers and technical staff to manage project schedules, identify and mitigate risks, develop and track sprints and milestones, and ensure smooth launches.
* Provide clear communication across cross\-functional teams to drive transparency and end\-to\-end coordination of plans/progress/status.

title: Consulting/Principal Software Engineer
description:
**Consulting/Principal Software Engineer**

**Join a Diverse, Supportive, and Inclusive Team**

**We invite applicants from all backgrounds, experiences, and abilities to apply for the Software Engineering Lead position at ICIS. If you have a passion for building reliable, high\-quality software and want to help shape a collaborative and inclusive environment, we want to hear from you.**

**About the Business**


At ICIS, our mission is to optimize the world’s resources by providing transparency and insight to global markets. We support companies in making strategic, sustainable decisions across commodities value chains. Our commitment to diversity, equity, and inclusion means we welcome and support colleagues from all walks of life. To learn more about ICIS, visit https://www.icis.com/explore

**About the Team**


We work in collaborative Squads made up of individuals with varied backgrounds and skill sets. We foster open communication, shared learning, and mutual support, ensuring each team member’s unique experiences and perspectives are valued. Everyone’s voice matters as we pursue our shared goals together.

**About the Role**


We are looking for a Principal Software Engineer – Full Stack, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining sophisticated software solutions. Leveraging your technical expertise, you will drive innovation and operational efficiency, directly contributing to project success. Additionally, you will provide guidance and mentorship to fellow engineers and collaborate with cross\-functional teams to ensure the delivery of high\-quality, scalable software products.

**Responsibilities**

* Design, build, and maintain secure software solutions assigned to the team.
* Troubleshoot and resolve issues reported by customers.
* Coordinate and contribute directly to technical tasks and initiatives within the team.
* Collaborate with the Scrum Master, architects, and other stakeholders to ensure thorough planning and efficient execution of deliverables.
* Participate in cross\-team initiatives, including the development and implementation of standards and processes.
* Engage in knowledge\-sharing sessions with the broader group.
* Assist in planning efforts through detailed analysis and estimation of proposed product work.
* Provide support to other teams as needed.

 **Requirements**

**Essential:**

* Frontend (React / Micro Frontends)
* Strong experience with React and Redux (or equivalent state management).
* Strong TypeScript / JavaScript (ES6\+) skills.
* Solid knowledge of HTML5 / CSS3 and modern web standards.
* Experience with Micro Frontend architectures, including frameworks such as Piral.
* Experience building user interfaces that consume GraphQL APIs.
* Ability to design and architect efficient, reusable, and scalable front\-end systems.
* Experience implementing customer\-facing and internal user interfaces.
* Strong experience with Jest for unit testing.
* Experience with React Testing Library (or equivalent).
* Understanding frontend testing best practices (unit, integration, coverage).
* Strong experience with .NET / .NET Core.
* Experience designing and implementing GraphQL APIs.
* Strong understanding of GraphQL schemas, resolvers, queries, and mutations.
* Experience integrating backend services and data sources via GraphQL.
* Experience with .NET unit testing frameworks such as **xUnit**, NUnit, or MSTest.
* Experience using mocking frameworks (e.g., Moq).
* Experience working with databases, e.g. MongoDB or MS SQL Server.
* Understanding of backend testing strategies and API\-level testing.
* Experience working in Agile environments (Scrum / Kanban).
* Strong problem\-solving and analytical skills.
* Strong interpersonal and stakeholder communication skills.
* Passion for clean, maintainable, and high\-quality code.
* Proficient in the use of AI coding assistant tools such as GitHub Copilot.

**Desirable**

* Node.js experience.
* Experience with Amazon Web Services (AWS).
* CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices.
* Source control using GitHub.
* Containerization with Docker and orchestration using Kubernetes (K8s).
* Experience with end\-to\-end testing frameworks (e.g., Cypress, Playwright).
* Experience with additional JavaScript testing frameworks.
* Experience with data integration and streaming platforms such as StreamSets.
* Experience working with cloud data platforms / data warehouses such as Snowflake.

**Equal Opportunity Statement**


ICIS is dedicated to creating a workplace that is diverse, inclusive, and accessible to all. We welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds, abilities, and experiences. If you require any accommodations or adjustments during the application process, please let us know. We are committed to supporting you throughout your journey with us.

**Learn more about the LexisNexis Risk team and how we work**


**We know your well\-being and happiness are key to a long and successful career. We are delighted to offer country specific benefits. Click** **here** **to access benefits specific to your location.**


We are committed to providing a fair and accessible hiring process. If you have a disability or other need that requires accommodation or adjustment, please let us know by completing our Applicant Request Support Form or please contact 1\-855\-833\-5120\.

Please read our Candidate Privacy Policy.

title: Sr QA Engineer
description:
About the Role
We are looking for a QA Engineer to own quality assurance for an intelligent document extraction solution. This role will validate both the AI\-driven extraction accuracy and the application integrations, ensuring the solution meets functional, compliance, and performance standards before production rollout.  

Key Responsibilities
Author, execute, and maintain functional, integration, and regression test cases covering all document types in scope
Validate LLM extraction accuracy, verify field values, null handling, business rule logic, and conditional extraction rules against expected outputs
Design and execute end\-to\-end integration test scenarios covering the full pipeline from document ingestion through AI processing to data persistence and downstream system integration
Track, manage, and report defects; coordinate resolution with the development and AI architecture teams
Validate PII data handling and ensure compliance with enterprise governance and security controls
Perform regression testing after changes to prompts, field schemas, or model versions
Support UAT with business stakeholders and operations teams  

Required Skills \& Experience  

4\-6 years of experience in software QA with exposure to AI or data pipeline testing
Experience testing API\-driven integrations and document processing workflows
Familiarity with Azure services (Azure SQL, Power Automate) preferred
Strong defect tracking and test management skills (Azure DevOps or equivalent)
Ability to validate structured data outputs (JSON) against business rules and field schemas
Attention to detail for compliance\-sensitive, PII\-handling scenarios
Experience in financial services or lending domain is a plus

title: Software Engineer, FIC Sales Technology, AVP
description:
**Job Description:**
--------------------

**Job Title:** **Software Engineer, FIC Sales Technology**

**Location: Bangalore, India**

**Corporate Title: AVP**

**Role Description**

* Join the FIC Sales Technology team within Deutsche Bank’s Client 360 Technology group. As an AVP Software Engineer, you will be a hands ‑ on contributor building modern UI components, backend services, and data ‑ driven features that directly support our Fixed Income \& Currencies (FIC) sales organisation. AI technologies will be central to the platform’s evolution, and the systems you build will connect with and enable the AI ‑ driven Sales Assistant capabilities we plan to deliver.
* We are looking for an ambitious engineer with strong technical skills and a genuine interest in the FIC business. You will work on a mix of AI ‑ related features and core application components, contribute to shaping the technical direction, and expand your influence on the technical direction over time while delivering high ‑ quality software used directly by front ‑ office teams.

**What we’ll offer you**

As part of our flexible scheme, here are just some of the benefits that you’ll enjoy


* Best in class leave policy
* Gender neutral parental leaves
* 100% reimbursement under childcare assistance benefit (gender neutral)
* Sponsorship for Industry relevant certifications and education
* Employee Assistance Program for you and your family members
* Comprehensive Hospitalization Insurance for you and your dependents
* Accident and Term life Insurance
* Complementary Health screening for 35 yrs. and above

**Your key responsibilities**

* Hands‑on engineering: Build high‑performance, scalable software components using modern engineering practices and contribute to complex technical problem‑solving.
* Service‑led architecture design: Support the design and implementation of distributed, service‑oriented architectures using Java or Kotlin, ensuring reliability and maintainability.
* Modern UI development: Create intuitive and responsive user interfaces using React, improving how salespeople access insights and manage client workflows.
* AI‑enabled feature development: Contribute to AI‑driven capabilities, including NLP and predictive analytics, that enhance sales effectiveness and client engagement.
* Platform integration and evolution: Integrate with existing systems and help build a cohesive, data‑driven sales technology ecosystem aligned with DB’s strategic direction.
* Cross‑team collaboration: Work closely with sales, product, data, and engineering teams to gather requirements, shape solutions, and ensure successful delivery.

**Your skills and experience**

* Strong engineering background delivering complex software in fast‑paced environments, with a solid grounding in Object‑Oriented and/or Functional programming, and proven use of XP/agile practices including TDD, acceptance testing, pair programming, and continuous integration.
* Proficiency in Java or Kotlin, and familiarity with building modern web applications Typescript and modern React.
* Experience applying iterative development to deliver high‑value outcomes in complex domains
* Experience contributing to AI/ML features (e.g., NLP, data processing, or model‑driven systems), combined with practical use of AI development tools such as GitHub Copilot in a human‑in‑the‑loop, iterative workflow.
* Familiarity with CI/CD, observability, and operating production systems
* Understanding of front‑office or revenue‑generating technology in an investment bank, together with knowledge of FIC products (FX, Credit, Rates, or EM) — or a strong motivation to develop this domain expertise and learn sales workflows.

**How we’ll support you**

* Training and development to help you excel in your career
* Coaching and support from experts in your team
* A culture of continuous learning to aid progression
* A range of flexible benefits that you can tailor to suit your needs

**About us and our teams**

Please visit our company website for further information:


**https://www.db.com/company/company.html**

We strive for a culture in which we are empowered to excel together every day. This includes acting responsibly, thinking commercially, taking initiative and working collaboratively.


Together we share and celebrate the successes of our people. Together we are Deutsche Bank Group.


We welcome applications from all people and promote a positive, fair and inclusive work environment.

title: Data Engineer - Analytics
description:
Information Technology
Job ID:
75173
Pune, MH, IN (On\-Site)
Permanent
  
About the Role:


Ferrero India is looking to fill the full\-time position of a Data Engineer reporting to the central Data \& AI team. This position covers all countries and categories in which Ferrero operates.



The Data Engineer, which is an emerging role in Ferrero’s Data \& AI team, will play a pivotal role in operationalizing the most critical advanced analytics initiatives for Ferrero’s digital and business transformation objectives. The bulk of the Data Engineer’s work will be to support data scientists, collaborating with data analysts and technical teams to prepare modeling\-ready datasets by integrating across systems large existing datasets related to all our brands globally, ensuring they meet the requirements of the data science project or program.



The Data Engineer will be measured on their ability to effectively build, optimize and manage multiple pipelines with little supervision and to adhere to Data Science, Machine Learning and AI modeling requirements.


Main Responsibilities:


* Integrate existing data pipelines and databases: Working in Group tools to integrate existing local pipelines and databases to meet modelling requirements.
* **Build new data pipelines:** The Group is implementing new platforms to collect digital \& media marketing campaigns, customer, global syndicated, and Open Innovation R\&D data \- directly at source or through 3rd party agencies and providers, and the Data Engineer will be part of those project teams to understand the full collection cycle. They will then take over responsibility \- together with the Data Engineering Team and IT partners \- to build and manage the pipelines and datasets to bring the data into Ferrero IT architecture for analytics products modelling.
* **Support Consumer Master data governance initiatives:** The Data Engineer will be responsible for supporting projects related to the standardization of data within the Consumer domain.


About You:


**Education \& Experience:**


* Master’s degree in computer science, Data Science, Data Management, Information Systems, Information Science or a related quantitative field.


* Two to five years of work experience relevant to data engineering responsibilities and tasks; preferably within a data science team or on modelling projects.


* Experience working in cross\-functional teams and cross\-cultural teams.


**Required IT Skills:**


* Strong experience with ETL tools (Microsoft Fabric, Fabric Data Engineering, Databricks, Analysis Services); SQL database design / architecture / management; and data catalog technology (Purview \+ Databricks Unity Catalog).
* Proficiency in Python and Spark for ETL pipelines.
* Knowledge of Advanced Analytics techniques; MLOps, Python would be a plus.
* Familiarity with AI Platforms (MS AI Foundry), big data technologies (Spark, Hadoop, etc), cloud computing platforms (MS Azure) and Git code versioning through Azure DevOps.
* Understanding data security and compliance.


**Personal Skills:**


* Energy, good judgment, proactivity, a sense of urgency and demonstrated commitment to high standards of ethics, regulatory compliance, service and business integrity;riosity,
* Curiosity, problem solving and genuine interest in data, technology and the FMCG industry;
* Fluent in English;
* Other languages and international experience a plus.
  

About Ferrero:


Ferrero began its journey in the small town of **Alba in Piedmont, Italy, in 1946\.** Today, it is one of the world’s largest sweet\-packaged food companies, with many **iconic brands** sold in countries all over the world. Find out more about Ferrero at ferrero.com.


DE\&I at Ferrero:


Ferrero is committed to building a diverse and inclusive culture in which all employees feel welcomed and appreciated and have the same opportunities. We believe all our people are equally talented in their own way. In nurturing the curiosity and natural abilities of our employees, we provide them, generation after generation, the means to succeed personally and professionally, enabling them to craft their journey at Ferrero. The diversity of our talents is what makes our work environment multicultural, innovative, and highly rewarding.  

Find out more here.


  
**Our Application Process**
---------------------------


We’re constantly looking for talented individuals who are ready to be part of our dynamic and growing organization. Ferrero is a company with a global presence and family values. Join us!

##### **1\. Apply**


Complete your online application, upload your CV and include brief cover letter to help us understand your experience and interests

##### **2\. Assess**


Our HR team will arrange a phone or video interview if we feel your qualifications are a good match for the job

##### **3\. Interview**


If the first interview goes well, you’ll be invited to speak with a Ferrero manager to assess your competencies, technical aptitude and fit within our dynamic organization

title: Storage Architect - Automation, VP
description:
**Job Description:**
--------------------

**Job Title:** **Storage Architect \- Automation, VP**

**Location: Pune/ Bangalore, India**

**Role Description**

* We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Automation Engineer to join our team.
* The successful candidate will be responsible for designing, implementing, and operating enterprise\-grade storage, backup, recovery, and cyber resilience automated solutions.
* This role requires a strong focus on automation and scripting, with other knowledge in LLM API Integration, Agent Development Kit, Google AI Studio/Vertex AI, LangChain, Custom Agent Development, AutoGPT, Llama Index.
* The engineer will be crucial in designing and implementing workflows within ServiceNow, leveraging API integrations to streamline storage and backup offering processes.
* The engineer will play a critical role in working as primary liaison with Business, QA, Development teams and Vendors for major releases, recreation of customer issues, subsequent Hot fix and patch testing before release of patches into production environment.

**What we’ll offer you**

As part of our flexible scheme, here are just some of the benefits that you’ll enjoy


* Best in class leave policy
* Gender neutral parental leaves
* 100% reimbursement under childcare assistance benefit (gender neutral)
* Sponsorship for Industry relevant certifications and education
* Employee Assistance Program for you and your family members
* Comprehensive Hospitalization Insurance for you and your dependents
* Accident and Term life Insurance
* Complementary Health screening for 35 yrs. and above

**Your key responsibilities**

* Design, develop, and implement automated solutions for storage, backup, recovery, and cyber resilience across the enterprise.
* **Capable in** **delivering high quality products related to storage and backup by performing Functional testing, System testing, Regression testing, Exploratory testing and Ad hoc testing.**
* Architect and deploy scalable and highly available storage \& backup infrastructure and processes.
* Lead the integration of storage \& backup solutions with broader IT infrastructure and security frameworks.
* Develop and maintain custom applications and scripts using Perl and Python for automated alerting, monitoring, and reporting of storage \& backup system health, performance, and compliance.
* Managing and deploying playbook using Ansible
* Specialize in the configuration, management, and automation of storage \& backup environments.
* **Design and implement efficient workflows within ServiceNow to automate storage \& backup environments**
* **Develop and maintain API integrations for storage \& backup** **to enable advanced automation and interoperability with other systems.**
* Ensure all storage, backup and recovery solutions meet stringent cyber resilience and disaster recovery objectives.
* Collaborate with security, infrastructure, and application teams to define and implement data protection strategies.
* Perform root cause analysis for complex storage \& backup issues and implement preventative measures.
* Develop and maintain comprehensive documentation for all automated solutions, processes, and infrastructure.
* Participate in on\-call rotation and provide expert support for critical storage, backup and recovery incidents as required.
* Stay current with industry trends and emerging technologies in data protection, automation, and cyber resilience.

**Your skills and experience**

* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* Proven experience (10\+ years) in designing, implementing, and operating enterprise\-level storage, backup and recovery solutions.
* Strong expertise in automation and scripting using Perl, Shell or Javascript. Python is a must requirement
* **Good Experience in Selenium WebDriver, Robot Framework, Pytest and Appium for API Automation, UI Automation and Component Tests Automation.**
* Knowledge in managing automation tools like Selenium WebDriver, Appium or Cypress
* In\-depth knowledge and hands\-on experience with DELL, Netapp, PURE, HPE and IBM Storage Protect (IBM Spectrum Protect/TSM).
* **Demonstrated experience in designing and implementing workflows within ServiceNow.**
* **Extensive experience with Cohesity, including designing and implementing automation workflows.**
* **Proficient in storage \& backup product** **API integration for advanced automation and customization.**
* Solid understanding of backup architectures, data recovery strategies, and cyber resilience principles.
* Experience with monitoring tools, logging systems, and alert management.
* Excellent problem\-solving skills and the ability to troubleshoot complex technical issues.
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to work effectively in a team environment and interact with stakeholders at all levels.

**Preferred Skills:**

title: Application System Engineer
description:
**Your Job**The Application Systems Analyst \- ServiceNow Operations is responsible for ensuring the stability, performance, and reliability of the ServiceNow platform. This position combines strong operational ownership with collaboration across technical and business teams to maintain service continuity, manage incidents, support platform activities, and enable ongoing improvements. You will coordinate key operational cycles, while providing technical and procedural support that enhances the platform's efficiency and user experience.

**Our Team**

You will join the Global Enterprise Service Management capability, a team dedicated to enabling Koch business through transformation and innovation. Our platform enables key lifecycle capabilities, including IT Service Management, HR Service Delivery, Portfolio Management, Application/Infrastructure Management, Legal Service Delivery, AI and Consumer Experience. We are a collaborative and forward\-thinking team committed to delivering scalable solutions that drive measurable business value.

**What You Will Do**

* Troubleshoot and resolve complex incidents, defects, and operational issues, prioritizing escalations to maintain service continuity and meet SLAs.
* Act as a key Operations contact, supporting Product Owners, BSAs, Process Owners, Architects, and Business stakeholders.
* Monitor platform health, performance and the Operations queue to identify trends, anticipate risks, and ensure proactive resolution of potential service disruptions.
* Oversee and assess ServiceNow Hi Cases \& Communications, coordinating reviews and aligning required actions with Product Teams.
* Identify and implement automation and process improvement opportunities to streamline recurring operational activities, increase efficiency, reduce technical debt, and enhance long\-term platform sustainability.
* Partner with Product Teams to provide critical operational insights and support during sprints, influencing design and deployment decisions that improve delivery quality, velocity, and long\-term platform stability.
* Coordinate latent and urgent change requests, ensuring communication, documentation, and risk control.

**Who You Are (Basic Qualifications)**

* Hands\-on experience supporting or managing enterprise applications, preferably within the ServiceNow platform.
* Proven experience in incident, problem, change, and release management processes within an ITSM environment.
* Proven ability to analyze and resolve complex technical or operational issues, escalating effectively when required.
* Familiarity with the ServiceNow platform or similar enterprise tools, with an understanding of core modules and their functionality (e.g., ITSM, ITOM, CMDB), including how they support business processes.
* High sense of ownership and accountability for operational performance, ensuring reliability and continuous improvement.
* Excellent organizational and communication skills, with the ability to prioritize and manage multiple streams of work.
* Experience working in a global, cross\-functional, and Agile team environment.

**What Will Put You Ahead**

* Familiarity with ITIL or ITSM frameworks, emphasizing proactive problem management and continuous improvement.
* Hands\-on experience supporting or coordinating ServiceNow platform upgrades, clones, or patching cycles.
* Experience collaborating across multiple product teams, aligning operational activities, sprint priorities, and release dependencies.
* Working knowledge of ServiceNow Hi Case management, including advisory tracking and communication with vendor support.
* Experience driving improvement through automation and process optimization, as well as monitoring or integration troubleshooting within enterprise systems.
* Proven ability to lead cross\-team coordination for operational changes, incident response, or release activities.
* Promote a positive team culture centered on contribution motived, collaboration, transparency, accountability, and curiosity.
* Strong communication and analytical skills to translate operational insights into process or system improvements.
* Experience participating in major incident coverage, providing critical support during high\-impact events.

At Koch companies, we are entrepreneurs. This means we openly challenge the status quo, find new ways to create value and get rewarded for our individual contributions. Any compensation range provided for a role is an estimate determined by available market data. The actual amount may be higher or lower than the range provided considering each candidate's knowledge, skills, abilities, and geographic location. If you have questions, please speak to your recruiter about the flexibility and detail of our compensation philosophy.

**Who We Are**

At Koch, employees are empowered to do what they do best to make life better. Learn how our business philosophy helps employees unleash their potential while creating value for themselves and the company.


Additionally, everyone has individual work and personal needs. We seek to enable the best work environment that helps you and the business work together to produce superior results.

title: Project Manager – Manufacturing IT & OT
description:
### **About Us**


At Thoucentric, we offer end\-to\-end consulting solutions designed to address the most pressing business challenges across industries. Leveraging deep domain expertise, cutting\-edge technology, and a results\-driven approach, we help organizations streamline operations, enhance decision\-making, and accelerate growth. We are headquartered in Bangalore with presence across multiple locations in India, US, UK, Singapore \& Australia Globally.  

  



We help clients with Business Consulting, Program \& Project Management, Digital Transformation, Product Management, Process \& Technology Solutioning and Execution including Analytics \& Emerging Tech areas cutting across functional areas such as Supply Chain, Finance \& HR, Sales \& Distribution across US, UK, Singapore and Australia. Our unique consulting framework allows us to focus on execution rather than pure advisory. We are working closely with marquee names in the global consumer \& packaged goods (CPG) industry, new age tech and start\-up ecosystem.  

We have been certified as "Great Place to Work" by AIM and have been ranked as "50 Best Firms for Data Scientists to Work For".  

We have an experienced consulting team of over 500\+ world\-class business and technology consultants based across six global locations, supporting clients through their expert insights, entrepreneurial approach and focus on delivery excellence. We have also built point solutions and products through Thoucentric labs using AI/ML in the supply chain space.  

### **Job Description**


**Project Manager – Manufacturing IT \& OT**

 **Location: Gurgaon, India (with frequent travel to Sitargunj, Hosur, Mysore)**

 **About the Role**

  

We are accelerating a major digital transformation journey across multiple manufacturing locations in India. We are looking for a Project Manager – Manufacturing IT \& OT who will lead, execute, and govern key technology initiatives across factories in Sitargunj, Hosur, and Mysore. The role is based out of Gurgaon, with regular travel to plant locations. This individual will be responsible for planning, driving, and delivering IT \& OT programs—ranging from digital tools deployment to IT/OT cybersecurity improvements—ensuring that each site meets internal audit, compliance, and operational readiness requirements. You will serve as the central orchestrator between factory operations, engineering, corporate IT/OT teams, and external vendors, ensuring timely delivery and adherence to internal standards. The role will also oversee and guide two site‑level IT/OT support team members who act as the execution arms within the factories.

 **Key Responsibilities**

 **1\.** Project \& Program Management

  

* Lead end\-to\-end planning, execution, tracking, and governance of all IT \& OT projects across the three factory locations.
* Define project plans, milestones, resource needs, and vendor deliverables.
* Ensure timely delivery and proactively remove execution roadblocks.
* Drive cross‑functional alignment among Operations, Engineering, Quality, IT Security, and Corporate IT teams.

  

2\. IT \& OT Compliance \& Audit Readiness

  

* Own remediation and closure of ITGC, cybersecurity, OT controls, and audit observations at all plants.
* Implement and monitor compliance for:
+ OT asset inventory completion
+ Backup/restore readiness of OT assets
+ Network segmentation \& security policies
+ Access governance for IT \& OT systems

* Coordinate with internal auditors, plant leadership, and global teams to ensure full compliance.

  

3\. Deployment of Digital \& Automation Solutions

  

* Lead rollout of manufacturing digital tools such as:
+ OT backup/restore platforms
+ Gate pass, permit\-to\-work, and contractor management systems
+ Asset tracking solutions
+ Shop\-floor digital applications

* Ensure solution adoption, training, and change management at factories.
* Validate solution performance through structured UAT and post‑go‑live reviews.

  

4\. Factory Engagement \& Stakeholder Partnership

  

* Act as the IT/OT single point of contact for Sitargunj, Hosur, and Mysore plants.
* Conduct regular site visits, governance meetings, and status reviews.
* Identify digital improvement opportunities in collaboration with plant leadership.
* Build strong relationships with Factory Directors, EHS, Quality, Engineering, and local IT teams.

  

5\. Team Leadership

  

* Manage and mentor two on\-ground IT/OT support engineers located at plant sites.
* Set priorities, assign tasks, track performance, and guide their day‑to‑day execution.
* Build capabilities within the team on OT cyber hygiene, data practices, and digital tools.

  

6\. Vendor \& Partner Coordination

  

* Manage external vendors, OEMs, and solution partners for IT/OT deployments.
* Handle vendor negotiation, contract finalization (with legal/commercial teams), and delivery oversight.
* Ensure vendors meet internal standards for documentation, security, and implementation quality.

### **Requirements**

**Required Skills \& Experience**

 **Education**

  

* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Industrial Automation, Computer Science, IT, Electronics, or related field.
* Project Management certifications (PMP/Prince2/Agile) preferred.

 **Experience**

  

* 6–9 years of experience in Manufacturing IT, OT, Automation, or Digital Transformation roles.
* Proven track record of managing multi\-site technology projects end\-to\-end.
* Experience working with OT environments: PLCs, SCADA, DCS, industrial networks.
* Strong understanding of ITGC, OT cybersecurity frameworks, audit controls, and regulatory compliance.
* Strong stakeholder and vendor management experience.

 **Technical Competencies**

  

* Knowledge of OT protocols, industrial networks, and cybersecurity best practices.
* Familiarity with SAP, ServiceNow, ITSM processes, and digital factory tools.
* Understanding of MES/SCADA integrations, data flows, and system architectures.
* Strong documentation and reporting skills.

 **Soft Skills**

  

* High ownership mindset and urgency in execution.
* Strong analytical, organizational, and decision\-making ability.
* Ability to influence stakeholders across factory and corporate teams.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills.

 **Travel Requirement**

  

Willingness to travel 20–40% to Sitargunj, Hosur, and Mysore based on project needs.

title: Specialist Search and Backend Engineer
description:
**Job Description**

**Required Skills:**

**Preferred Skills:**


Current Employees apply HERE


Current Contingent Workers apply HERE

**Secondary** **Language(s) Job Description:**

**Specialist Search and Backend Engineer**

**The Opportunity**

* Based in Hyderabad, join a global healthcare biopharma company and be part of a 130\- year legacy of success backed by ethical integrity, forward momentum, and an inspiring mission to achieve new milestones in global healthcare.
* Be part of an organisation driven by digital technology and data\-backed approaches that support a diversified portfolio of prescription medicines, vaccines, and animal health products.
* Drive innovation and execution excellence. Be a part of a team with passion for using data, analytics, and insights to drive decision\-making, and which creates custom software, allowing us to tackle some of the world's greatest health threats.


Our Technology Centers focus on creating a space where teams can come together to deliver business solutions that save and improve lives. An integral part of our companys’ IT operating model, Tech Centers are globally distributed locations where each IT division has employees to enable our digital transformation journey and drive business outcomes. These locations, in addition to the other sites, are essential to supporting our business and strategy.


A focused group of leaders in each Tech Center helps to ensure we can manage and improve each location, from investing in growth, success, and well\-being of our people, to making sure colleagues from each IT division feel a sense of belonging to managing critical emergencies. And together, we must leverage the strength of our team to collaborate globally to optimize connections and share best practices across the Tech Centers.

**Role overview**


As a Senior Backend Search and Anaytics Engineer, you will architect and deliver the core backend systems, search engines, data pipelines, and APIs that power Discover. Your work will impact:


Platform Search Performance \& Discoverability

* You will improve search relevance, indexing quality, ranking logic, and metadata\-driven search experiences trusted by thousands of enterprise users.
* High‑Scale API Infrastructure Across the Enterprise
* Your API engineering decisions impact integration reliability, data access speed, platform stability, and customer experience.

**Data Pipelines \& Analytics Intelligence**

* ETL workflows, search analytics, and data ingestion pipelines built by you fuel data freshness, insights, and product intelligence.

**CI/CD Velocity \& Engineering Productivity**

* Your work in GitHub Actions and DevOps automation ensures fast, safe, zero\-downtime deployments with automated test coverage and quality gates.

**Enterprise Reliability \& Scalability**

* You directly influence uptime, performance, operational efficiency, and cost optimization across AWS and backend services.

**Key Responsibilities**

**Backend Engineering / API Engineering**

* Design, implement, and optimize Java 11\+/17 Spring Boot microservices.
* Build API\-first backend services following standards: versioning, idempotency, pagination, filtering, rate limits, throttling, retries, timeouts, and circuit breakers.
* Integrate Github Copilot and proficiency in AI coding tools and integration.
* Understanding of Context Engineering

Own end\-to\-end API lifecycle: design build document test deploy* monitor.
* Build and maintain backend systems for search indexing, ranking, metadata enrichment, and analytics pipelines.
* Write clean, modular, secure code with strong logging, validation, exception handling, and resiliency patterns.

**Search Analytics \& Optimization**

* Capture and analyze search queries, clickstreams, user behavior, autocomplete patterns, and ranking metrics.
* Optimize search relevance, result ordering, and metadata\-driven discoverability.
* Identify zero‑result searches and implement corrective indexing or transformation logic.
* Integrate platform telemetry using Google Analytics (GA4\) and search instrumentation.

**ETL, Data Pipelines \& Analytics Workflows (Python, Airflow, AWS Glue)**

* **Build robust ETL workflows using:**
	+ **Apache Airflow**
	+ **AWS Glue**
	+ **Python**
* Automate search analytics pipelines, metadata ingestion, data quality scoring, and data lake operations.
* Maintain data pipelines on AWS S3, ensuring schema integrity, partitioning, and performance optimization.

**AWS Cloud Engineering**

* **Develop and deploy backend services using:**
	+ Lambda, ECS/EKS, API Gateway
	+ SQS/SNS, EventBridge
	+ DynamoDB, RDS/Aurora
	+ S3, Glue, CloudWatch, X‑Ray
* Implement cost optimization strategies across compute, ETL, and API workloads.
* Implement security \& governance standards (IAM fine\-grained roles, KMS encryption, secrets management).

**Quality Engineering**

* Build and maintain robust test suites:
	+ Unit testing – JUnit, Mockito
	+ Integration testing – Testcontainers
	+ Contract testing – OpenAPI validators
	+ Load/Performance testing – JMeter/Locust


Work with QA to establish backend test automation frameworks and quality gates.

**GitHub Actions, CI/CD \& DevOps Automation**

**A major part of this role includes CI/CD engineering.**

* Build enterprise\-grade GitHub Actions pipelines:  

Multi\-stage pipelines (build test scan package deploy)  

  

Unit, integration, and contract test automation  

Security scans (SAST/DAST, dependency scanning)  

Code quality gates (SonarQube or equivalent)
* Implement GitHub Actions capabilities like:
	+ Reusable workflows
	+ Environment\-specific deployment workflows
	+ OIDC for secure AWS deploys
	+ Branch protection rules
	+ PR checks, automation, and merge gate rules
* Ensure consistent artifact versioning, tagging, and release processes.
* Improve developer experience through automation, tooling, repeatable workflows, and pipeline optimization.

**Observability, Reliability \& Operations**

* Implement distributed tracing, structured logging, and custom metrics.
* Own SLOs/SLIs, error budgets, alerting, and dashboards.
* Participate in on\-call rotation, incident management, RCA, and reliability engineering.
* Reduce P1/P2 incidents through preventative design and automated guardrails.

**Collaboration**

* Lead API design reviews, code reviews, and architectural walkthroughs.
* Partner with Product, UX, Data Engineering, Cloud, and Platform Engineering.
* Contribute to engineering standards, API governance, and best practices.

**Primary skills**  

Cloud engineering (AWS / Azure), CI/CD automation, Infrastructure as Code (Terraform / IaC), Kubernetes / container orchestration, DevSecOps / security automation, Monitoring / observability, AI\-driven automation, Reusable template\-driven engineering, Analytics / telemetry pipelines, API / microservices engineering, Google Analytics / product analytics

**Nice\-to\-have skills**  

Context engineering, ETL / ELT pipelines, Jenkins / Azure DevOps / GitHub Actions, Helm / service mesh, Secrets management, Performance optimization, Scripting (Python / Bash), Documentation / agile collaboration

 **Qualifications (Required)**

* 5\+ years’ experience in backend engineering.
* Strong expertise in Java 11\+/17, Spring Boot, microservices, and REST API engineering.
* Hands\-on experience with Python for ETL or backend data tasks.
* Strong understanding of ETL frameworks (Airflow or AWS Glue)
* Deep experience with AWS (API Gateway, S3, Lambda, DynamoDB, SQS/SNS, EventBridge, RDS/Aurora).
* Strong GitHub Actions and CI/CD expertise: pipelines, reusable workflows, testing automation, OIDC, ECR deployments.
* Experience with Docker, container orchestration (ECS/EKS preferred).
* Excellent debugging, performance optimization, and problem\-solving skills.
* Strong knowledge of cloud security (IAM, KMS, Secrets Manager).
* Excellent communication and cross\-functional collaboration skills.

**Tools \& Tech Stack**


Java 17 and above \| Spring Boot \| Python \| Apache Airflow \| AWS Glue \| AWS S3 \| AWS Lambda \| AWS Redshift\| AWS Athena \| ECS/EKS \| DynamoDB \| RDS/Aurora \| API Gateway \| SQS/SNS \| EventBridge \| Docker \| GitHub Actions \| OpenAPI \| JUnit \| Testcontainers \| SonarQube \| Snyk \| CloudWatch \|CI/CD \-Github actions, Jenkins\| X\-Ray \| Google Analytics \| Search Telemetry

**KPIs \& Success Metrics**

* High API reliability (SLO compliance, low error rates)
* Improved search relevance \& reduced zero\-result searches

ETL pipeline success rate* 99%
* Increase in safe deployment frequency with zero rollback
* Reduction in P1/P2 incidents
* Improved code quality \& test coverage
* Cost\-efficient AWS workloads

**Who we are**


We are known as Merck \& Co., Inc., Rahway, New Jersey, USA in the United States and Canada and MSD everywhere else. For more than a century, we have been inventing for life, bringing forward medicines and vaccines for many of the world's most challenging diseases. Today, our company continues to be at the forefront of research to deliver innovative health solutions and advance the prevention and treatment of diseases that threaten people and animals around the world.

**What we look for**


Imagine getting up in the morning for a job as important as helping to save and improve lives around the world. Here, you have that opportunity. You can put your empathy, creativity, digital mastery, or scientific genius to work in collaboration with a diverse group of colleagues who pursue and bring hope to countless people who are battling some of the most challenging diseases of our time. Our team is constantly evolving, so if you are among the intellectually curious, join us—and start making your impact today.

title: Manager - IT Quality
description:
Achieving our goals starts with supporting yours. Grow your career, access top\-tier health and wellness benefits, build lasting connections with your team and our customers, and travel the world using our extensive route network.  

  

Come join us to create what’s next. Let’s define tomorrow, together.  

**Description**
---------------


United's Digital Technology team is comprised of many talented individuals all working together with cutting\-edge technology to build the best airline in the history of aviation. Our team designs, develops and maintains massively scaling technology solutions brought to life with innovative architectures, data analytics, and digital solutions.

**Job overview and responsibilities**


As an Engineering Automation Test Manager of Information Technology at United Airlines, you will be responsible for day\-to\-day supervision and direction of QE Engineer related roles across multiple cross\-functional areas. You will directly supervise the Quality engineering professionals.  

In this role you will have the accountability of leading Quality efforts on multiple projects and/or a large program that consists of multiple testing tracks is necessary. You will work closely with US senior managers, managers, and SME leadership team to influence technical and architectural aspects of computing platforms.  

* Resource Management including mentoring, coaching performance appraisal, Capacity Planning and Budgeting.
* Develop and execute comprehensive test strategies, plans and schedules to ensure product quality and timely delivery.
* Drive test automation initiatives, including in\-sprint and intelligent testing, farmwork, script creation and maintenance to improve coverage and reduce test cycle completion time.
* Build strong partnership with application development teams, product managers, \& other stakeholders to ensure alignment on testing strategy, schedule, and scope.
* Continuously evaluate and improve testing processes, standards, metrics, and tools to enhance overall test efficiencies.
* Manage and mitigate testing related risks and issues.
 **This position is offered on local terms and conditions. Expatriate assignments and sponsorship for employment visas, even on a time\-limited visa status, will not be awarded. This position is for United Airlines Business Services Pvt. Ltd \- a wholly owned subsidiary of United Airlines Inc.**

**Qualifications**
------------------

**What’s needed to succeed (Minimum Qualifications):**

* Bachelor’s degree in computer science or computer engineering.
* 8\+ years of Software Testing and 5\+ years of people management.
* AWS Cloud Practitioner \& ISQTB / CSTE or similar.
* Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) and Software Testing Life Cycle (STLC).
* Please feel free add the below line: Exposure to AI\-driven testing tools and methodologies, including how modern software testing leverages artificial intelligence for test automation, predictive analytics, and defect detection.
